info.name: NotsHub API
info.description:
Complete API collection for NotsHub — Notes sharing platform.

Base URL variable: {{baseUrl}} (default: http://localhost:5000)

variable.description: Placeholder UUID — replace with actual ID

item.name: Authentication
item.description: User authentication, registration, OTP, and password management

request.description: Login with username/email and password. Returns JWT cookie + user info.
Register a new user. Sends OTP to email for verification.
Check signup status: AVAILABLE, PENDING_VERIFICATION, or ALREADY_REGISTERED. Includes OTP expiry and resend cooldown timers.
Verify the OTP sent during signup. Completes registration on success.
Resend OTP to email. Cooldown: 60 seconds between resends.
Send password reset link to email. Link expires in 10 minutes.
Reset password using the token received via email.
Get current authenticated user details. Requires JWT.
Get current authenticated username. Requires JWT.
Logout and clear JWT cookie.
Get paginated list of all users. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN role.

item.name: Universities
item.description: Manage universities (CRUD + logo upload to S3)

formdata.description: Optional logo image file — uploads to AWS S3

request.description: Create a university. Send raw JSON in 'data' part, optional logo file in 'logo' part. Logo uploads to AWS S3. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Get paginated list of all universities.
Get a university by its URL-friendly slug.
Get paginated programs belonging to a university.

formdata.description: Optional logo image file — uploads to AWS S3

request.description: Update a university. Send raw JSON in 'data' part, optional logo file in 'logo' part. Logo uploads to AWS S3. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete a university. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Create a new program. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Get paginated list of all programs.
Get a program by its UUID.
Get a program by its URL-friendly slug.
Get paginated branches belonging to a program.
Update a program. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete a program. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Create a new branch. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Get paginated list of all branches.
Get a branch by its UUID.
Get a branch by its URL-friendly slug.
Get paginated semesters belonging to a branch.
Update a branch. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete a branch. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Create a new semester. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Get paginated list of all semesters.
Get paginated subjects belonging to a semester.
Update a semester. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete a semester. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Create a new subject. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Get paginated list of all subjects.
Get a subject by its UUID.
Get a subject by its URL-friendly slug.
Get paginated notes belonging to a subject.
Update a subject. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete a subject. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.

item.name: Notes
item.description: Upload, search, approve/reject, and download notes

formdata.value: Comprehensive notes covering arrays, linked lists, and trees

request.description: Upload a PDF note. Uses multipart form-data. Requires authentication.
Get paginated list of all notes. Supports optional search via ?q= parameter.
Search notes by keyword.
Get notes by their URL-friendly slug.
Generate a pre-signed S3 download link for a note. Requires authentication.
Update notes metadata. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Approve pending notes. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Reject pending notes with optional reason. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Delete notes. Requires UNIVERSITY_ADMIN or SUPER_ADMIN.
Check application health status.
Application info.
